programs.title: Bill Bailey's Australian Adventure
programs.desc: In and around Perth, Bill samples a heady comedic cocktail of hip wineries, prison tunnels, gnomes and heavy metal jamming.

programs.title: Bill Bailey Live: Part Troll
programs.desc: The funniest bearded, babbling, bug-eyed druid the world has ever seen, captured in his natural habitat: the Hammersmith Apollo, during his sold-out comedy tour.

programs.title: 999: On the Front Line
programs.desc: Paramedics treat a woman who has taken drugs and is hallucinating at a hotel, a woman who has chest pains, and a child who is feverish and can't speak.

programs.title: 999: On the Front Line
programs.desc: Paramedics treat a man who's in cardiac arrest, a 16-year-old who has collapsed by a canal and a three-year-old who's struggling to breathe.

programs.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programs.desc: Independent 80-year-old Frances has fallen into her empty swimming pool. Jerry, who's 20, is starting to question partying until 5am on a weeknight after ending up in A&E.

programs.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programs.desc: Michelle, 54, is airlifted to St George's after being involved in a car crash with her husband Paul. Derren, 41, has fractured his ankle while trampolining with his daughter.
